basic_details.job_title: NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NCRTC Express Transit (NETRA) Chief Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website www.ncrtc.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NETRA Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 55 years

qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer: B.E/B.Tech. or its equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ncrtc.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
